name: @reliquary/eslint-config-react
description: React + Jest + Testing Library ESLint rules — the React layer for @reliquary/eslint-config.
author: Alex de Mulder

scripts.release:npm: bun -e "if(!process.env.RELIQUARY_RELEASE){console.error('Release only via the root scripts (bun run release:all or release:NAME), not directly');process.exit(1)}" && bun publish && git tag -a "$npm_package_name@$npm_package_version" -m "$npm_package_name@$npm_package_version"
